ctaBanner.title: Ready to discuss a container load?
ctaBanner.subtitle: Tell us your target specs, destination port, and timeline. We quote the same day in most time zones.

home.metaDescription: Coconut shell shisha charcoal briquettes from Semarang, Indonesia. Factory-direct, MOQ {moqTons} tons (one {moqContainer}). Full export documentation and consistent burn specifications.

hero.title: Shisha charcoal briquettes for importers who run the numbers
hero.subtitle: {moqTons}-ton container loads from our Semarang factory. Full export documentation, consistent burn specifications, and samples you can verify in the lab before you commit.

footer.logoTagline: {certifications} Certified Shisha Charcoal Manufacturer in Indonesia

description.label: About {legalName}
description.p1Suffix: , is an Indonesian direct manufacturer and wholesale exporter of 100% natural coconut shell charcoal briquettes specifically engineered for shisha and hookah applications.
description.p2: Officially established in {foundedYear} (Company Registration NIB: {nib}, National Tax ID: {taxId}) with its primary manufacturing facility located at {fullAddress}, the company sustains a production capacity of {capacityTonsPerDay} tons per day.
description.p3: Operating under the executive direction of {executives}.
description.p4: The factory is certified by {certifications} standards (audit by {certificationAudits}). We ensure uncompromising compliance with global maritime logistics, strictly adhering to IMDG Code UN 1361 Class 4.2 spontaneous combustion safety protocols, independent Self-Heating Tests (SHT), and the provision of fully authenticated Preferential Certificates of Origin for international container shipping.
